findings.description: Launcher embeds premium model pool directly into commander prompt string with explicit rotation list and banned models.
Launcher writes fleet.json and swarm-state.json with premium_model_pool and banned_child_models arrays.
Launcher validates commander-level models before launch; rejects banned models and defaults to premium rotation in metaswarm.
Commander instructions define premium and banned model lists and mandate explicit premium overrides for Squad Lead/Worker launches.
Commander must build context capsule including model_policy=premium plus premium and banned model arrays before launching children.
Guidance requires recording launched model and marking partial on banned fallback, but no hard pre-launch blocking hook is shown in this file.
Propagation relies on instruction cascade from launcher to commander to squad leads/workers; enforcement beyond launcher appears policy-driven rather than code-enforced in this scope.
